summary: In this clip from This or That with Bhartendra, Devina Mehra explains why Indian investors can’t afford to stay concentrated only in India. The rupee has depreciated 90% against the dollar over a career span.

tool.label: Asset Allocator
tool.reason: How much of your money belongs outside India? Put in your numbers and see how big an international sleeve makes sense.

seo.title: The Rupee Keeps Falling… Should You Invest Abroad Too?
